description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.7 Docker image and runs apt update -y, apt upgrade -y, and pip3 install tox in a global before_script. Define a single stage named test and a job called test that runs the command tox. The test job should publish the directories htmlcov and mutpy_report as artifacts named BATATINHAS-$CI_PIPELINE_ID that expire after one week. No additional services, caches, or rules are required.
